title: Speaking Interview
description: The examiner asks you questions about yourself and your daily life. Answer naturally and try to give reasons for your answers.

phases.name: Socializing / Basics
questions: How long have you been studying English?
What do you enjoy most about learning English?

phases.name: Current Lifestyle
questions: How long have you been learning English? Has it been challenging?
Do you think you learn better in class or by yourself?
Would you like to learn any other languages? Which ones and why?
How important do you think it is to speak more than one language today?
What do you find most challenging about learning a foreign language?

phases.name: Opinions & Preferences
questions: Do you think translation apps will make it unnecessary to learn foreign languages?
What are the cultural benefits of learning another language?
Is it better to learn a language young or as an adult? Why?
